title: I prodotti DOP e IGP
topic_area: Italian cooking / food law and cultural identity
grammar_features_introduced: B2 full-Italian prose — argumentative and analytical register
congiuntivo imperfetto productively (purché si rispettino, mangiavano, seguono)
passato remoto receptive (non present, but flagged for future encounter)
connective adverbs of a formal register: dunque, malgrado, per quanto, inoltre
specialized legal-technical vocabulary: disciplinare, filiera, fregiarsi, tutela
cognate_patterns_showcased: fr -tion / it -zione (denominazione, lavorazione, registrazione, globalizzazione, certificazione, distribuzione)
highly specialized vocabulary from EU food-law register
notes: B2 challenge lesson, pure Italian, no audio. Longer and more complex than the B1 capstone — argumentative structure, formal register, specialized legal and economic vocabulary, abstract reasoning. Intended to stretch the reader to genuinely advanced Italian prose.
